creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Clamd segfaults on HEAD r297267 when trying it start it. This is with prebuild package from freebsd, or localy build. Annoying enough clamd works when clamav is build with WITH_DEBUG enabled. freshclam works fine.

 # service clamav-clamd restart           
clamav_clamd not running?
Starting clamav_clamd.
Segmentation fault
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/clamav-clamd: WARNING: failed to start clamav_clamd
 #
